title: McLets Play
description: the hit youtuber McAnna's letsplay Modpack
body:
letsplay modpack of the hit streamer and youtuber and tiktok star, McAnna.

for anyone who wants to play alongside or copy or anything else.

at the time of writing this modpack includes mods for decoration, world generation and marriage (not real marriage) and the great: Essential. mod

enjoy.
